# Project agent skills (Cursor)

These folders are **generated copies** (plain files, **not** symlinks — works the same on **Windows** and Unix) of the canonical skills in `'fy'-suites/despaghettify/superpowers/`.

**Do not edit here.** Change `'fy'-suites/despaghettify/superpowers/<name>/SKILL.md`, then run from the repository root:

```bash
python "./'fy'-suites/despaghettify/tools/sync_despag_skills.py"
```

Cursor discovers skills under `.cursor/skills/` automatically for this project (see repository `.gitignore`: only `skills/` is tracked under `.cursor/`).
